papers.title: Building real-time conversational podcasts with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
papers.summary: This post walks through building an automated podcast generator that creates engaging conversations between two AI hosts on any topic, demonstrating the streaming capabilities of Nova Sonic, stage-aware content filtering, and real-time audio generation.

papers.title: Text-to-SQL solution powered by Amazon Bedrock
papers.summary: In this post, we show you how to build a natural text-to-SQL solution using Amazon Bedrock that transforms business questions into database queries and returns actionable answers.

papers.title: Connecting MCP servers to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway using Authorization Code flow
papers.summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway provides a centralized layer for managing how AI agents connect to tools and MCP servers across your organization. In this post, we walk through how to configure AgentCore Gateway to connect to an OAuth-protected MCP server using the Authorization Code flow.

papers.title: Simulate realistic users to evaluate multi-turn AI agents in Strands Evals
papers.summary: In this post, we explore how ActorSimulator in Strands Evaluations SDK addresses the challenge with structured user simulation that integrates into your evaluation pipeline.

papers.title: Scaling seismic foundation models on AWS: Distributed training with Amazon SageMaker HyperPod and expanding context windows
papers.summary: This post describes how TGS achieved near-linear scaling for distributed training and expanded context windows for their Vision Transformer-based SFM using Amazon SageMaker HyperPod. This joint solution cut training time from 6 months to just 5 days while enabling analysis of seismic volumes larger than previously possible.

papers.title: KernelEvolve: How Meta’s Ranking Engineer Agent Optimizes AI Infrastructure
papers.description: This is the second post in the Ranking Engineer Agent blog series exploring the autonomous AI capabilities accelerating Meta’s Ads Ranking innovation. The previous post introduced Ranking Engineer Agent’s ML exploration capability, which autonomously designs, executes, and analyzes ranking model experiments. This post covers how to optimize the low-level infrastructure that makes those models run [...] Read More... The post KernelEvolve: How Meta’s Ranking Engineer Agent Optimizes AI Infrastr...

papers.title: Meta Adaptive Ranking Model: Bending the Inference Scaling Curve to Serve LLM-Scale Models for Ads
papers.description: Meta continues to lead the industry in utilizing groundbreaking AI Recommendation Systems (RecSys) to deliver better experiences for people, and better results for advertisers. To reach the next frontier of performance, we are scaling Meta’s Ads Recommender runtime models to LLM-scale & complexity to further a deeper understanding of people’s interests and intent. This increase [...] Read More... The post Meta Adaptive Ranking Model: Bending the Inference Scaling Curve to Serve LLM-Scale Mode...

papers.title: AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete
papers.description: Meta is continuing its long-term roadmap to help the construction industry leverage AI to produce high-quality and more sustainable concrete mixes, as well as those exclusively produced in the United States. Concurrent with the 2026 American Concrete Institute (ACI) Spring Convention, Meta is releasing a new AI model for designing concrete mixes – Bayesian Optimization [...] Read More... The post AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete appeared first on Engineering at Meta.

papers.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
papers.description: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

papers.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
papers.description: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

papers.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
papers.description: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

papers.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
papers.description: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

papers.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
papers.description: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.

papers.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
papers.description: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation

papers.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
papers.description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

papers.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
papers.description: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

papers.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
papers.description: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

papers.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
papers.description: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

papers.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
papers.description: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

papers.title: Creating with Sora Safely
papers.description: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

papers.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
papers.description: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools

papers.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
papers.description: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

papers.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
papers.description: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

papers.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
papers.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
